tasks.taskDescription: Coordinamento operativo e strategico per l'intero periodo del progetto. Include meeting settimanali con il team Gemelli e la gestione interna del team EVERSANA.

"Kickoff meeting tra il team EVERSANA e del Policlinico Gemelli per definire la strategia che guiderà l’intero progetto, definire i target di riferimento e gli obiettivi strategici.
Attività strategiche e fondative per la:
Definizione dei need e della strategia 
Creazione delle personas per gli stakeholder di riferimento con l’identificazione dei need e dei comportamenti
Definizione della roadmap strategica"

phases.phaseName: Assessment dell’esistente e creazione della piattaforma AI

tasks.taskDescription: Budget for the following activities will be confirmed after the assessment phase.
Non sono inclusi i costi per insfrastruttura AI, stimati in 0,50€ ogni 1000 domande
Non sono inclusi eventuali costi di Hosting stimati in 500€/mese con possibilità di scalare se le performance lo richiederanno

phases.phaseName: Integrazione della piattaforma AI e definizione delle analitiche e sistema di aggiornamento

tasks.taskDescription: Budget for the following activities will be confirmed after the assessment phase.
Non sono inclusi i costi per infrastruttura AI, stimati in 0,50€ ogni 1000 domande
Non sono inclusi eventuali costi di Hosting stimati in 500€/mese con possibilità di scalare se le performance lo richiederanno
Overall coordination for the entire period. It includes also kickoff meeting, periodic calls with client and intenral weekly calls.

tasks.taskName: Baseline Market Landscape, OOP Opportunity Assessment, Competitive Analysis (EU4+UK)
tasks.taskDescription: OOP market sizing and directional revenue modelling Self-pay target population segmentation and consumer journey analysis Willingness-to-pay and price sensitivity assessment Competitive landscape, pricing, and substitution intelligence Strategic prioritisation and market sequencing Establishment of a Strategic Landscape Observatory (2027-launch)

Systematic identification and vetting of priority channel partners per market
Confidential exploratory discussions and insight capture
End-to-end journey modelling (identification → prescribing → fulfilment → persistence)
Business model and pricing architecture design
Executive-level alignment with selected partners (Frontiers Health, Berlin – Oct 2026)

DTD, tele-prescribing, and promotion frameworks and preliminary guidance
Channel compliance stress-testing, scenario analysis, and preliminary guidance 
Data protection and consent governance preliminary guidance

Identification and engagement of priority KOLs and key opinion-shaping stakeholders per market
Development of a focused scientific and clinical narrative framework
Limited 1:1 exploratory engagements to establish relationships, gather needs, test positioning and adoption assumptions
Structured expert consultation to stress-test adoption assumptions and define the required scientific engagement model, field presence, and brand positioning

Kols' fees are not included
